mano_cua.result_summary: VuePDF demo页面（/demo/和/demo/highlight）仅显示PDF内容（论文Trace-based Just-in-Time Type Specialization for Dynamic Languages），无任何高亮/搜索UI控件。playground/App.vue源码仅含<VuePDF :pdf="pdf" />，无highlightText prop。通过DevTools Sources检查发现demo/highlight的HTML加载的是playground/main.ts→playground/App.vue，无独立的高亮配置。页面无搜索框、无高亮按钮、无任何交互控件来测试多段文本高亮功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Demo page at /demo/highlight uses the same playground/App.vue which only renders <VuePDF :pdf='pdf' /> without highlightText prop or any UI controls for text highlighting. No search box, highlight controls, or interactive UI found on the page.
